title: www.drybulkETF.com - August 3, 2021
summary: Smooth summer sailing for dry bulk but "stormy clouds" are likely gathering in the horizon - The last few weeks Beijing is once again showing its teeth in the battle against a polluting steel industry - Iron ore prices dropped Volatility in dry bulk freight to remain elevated - For the rest of 2021, we expect demand growth for dry bulk

children.title: Overview
children.summary:
- Smooth summer sailing for dry bulk but "stormy clouds" are likely gathering in the horizon - The last few weeks
- Beijing is once again showing its teeth in the battle against a polluting steel industry - Iron ore prices dropped
- Volatility in dry bulk freight to remain elevated - For the rest of 2021, we expect demand growth for dry bulk
